case_title: PATRICIA ELLIZAH TRATEBAS VS. JEAN CLADA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TRATEBAS, PATRICIA ELLIZAH AS TO DEFENDANT LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRATEBAS, PATRICIA ELLIZAH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE SERVED SEP-14-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TRATEBAS, PATRICIA ELLIZAH ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRATEBAS, PATRICIA ELLIZAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAIR, JEAN CLAUDE THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT HAD NOTICE OF PRIOR INCIDENTS AND DID NOT TAKE ADEQUATE SERCURITY PRECAUTIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JUN-02-2014
